title: parrya pazijae
side_effects: Parrya pazijae can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high alkaloid content. Prolonged consumption may also lead to cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat and blood pressure fluctuations. Additionally, improper use of the plant may cause allergic reactions, resulting in symptoms like skin rashes, itching, and respiratory issues. Furthermore, excessive consumption of Parrya pazijae may lead to kidney and liver damage, as the plant's toxins can accumulate in the body over time.
